text: Data visualization is an indispensable part of scientific communication, but writing code for specialized plotting programs such as R, Python, and genoplot can take a long time, and the price of commercial graphing software is too expensive for many scientists. Recently, we developed a new scientific and research plot tool SRplot (SRplot for short) that implements advanced data visualization and graphing functions through an easy-to-use web interface. To date, SRplot has implemented 120+ functional modules that are applicable to various fields of biomedical and bioinformatics research such as genomics, transcriptomics, clinical data and network analysis. All that scientists need to do is to copy and paste their data into the input interface of SRplot and then generate their desired plots quickly. All computational work is performed on the SRplot server, so there is no need for local hardware of any type. In addition, the GO, KEGG and TCGA databases are incorporated into SRplot. Many customizable options are available in SRplot, and all kinds of publication plots such as PNG, TIFF, PDF and SVG can be easily be generated from SRplot. So far, SRplot has served 46,000+ users and has been cited in over 550 papers in prestigious journals. SRplot is a dynamic tool, which is developed under the guidelines of user feedback, and is free available at http://www.bioinformatics.com.cn/SRplot.
